headline: Trump 😤🍊 SALTY AF over Nobel Snub, GREENLAND GO MODE 💥🧊‼️
text:
DONALD J. TRUMP 🍊🦅, the ultimate TROLL KING 👑😂, is RAGING 😡🔥 over Norway's Nobel Peace Prize COCKBLOCK 🛑🏆 – 'Y'all denied me for STOPPING 8 WARS 💥🛑 PLUS, so now I ain't OBLIGATED to be all PEACEY-PEACEY ☮️😴!' Dropped this 🔥BOMB📱 to Norway PM Jonas Gahr Støre 🇳🇴📲: 'Time to think what's GOOD & PROPER for 'MURICA 🇺🇸🍔 – WORLD ain't SECURE without TOTAL GREENLAND DOMINATION 🧊👑💪!' CBS & BBC spilling the tea ☕📰 on this savage text chain! 

Støre & Finland's Alexander Stubb 🇫🇮 begged for de-escalation 📉🙏 over Trump's TARIFF THREATS 🚫💰 – 10% on 8 NATO bros starting Feb ❄️📈, jacking to 25% by June ☀️😈 if they cockblock the Greenland GRAB 👐🧊! Trump claps back: 'Denmark 🇩🇰 can't shield from Putin 🐻🇷🇺 or Xi 🚀🇨🇳 – why they OWN it? Some BOAT 🛥️ landed centuries ago, WE HAD BOATS TOO 😂⛵!' Daddy Trump boasts: 'I BUILT NATO STRONGER THAN EVER 🛠️💥, now NATO OWES 'MURICA BIGLY! 🤑📈' 

Keir Starmer 🇬🇧🤓 simping for Denmark: 'Greenland's fate is GREENLANDERS & Danes ONLY 🧊❤️ – tariffs on allies? WRONG AF ❌!' Meanwhile, Danish & Greenlandic bosses meeting NATO's Mark Rutte 👨‍💼🤝 to flex MILITARY PRESENCE 🪖🚀 in Arctic – Euro squads sending recon troops 🕵️‍♂️❄️! Trump eyeing BUYOUT 💰🛒 or even MILITARY FORCE ⚔️🇺🇸 against NATO buddy? WILD 🤯💥! 

Nobel went to Venezuela's María Corina Machado 👩‍🦰🏆 (who LOVES Trump 😍🤝), but when Yanks SNATCHED Maduro 🛡️🚔 from Caracas on DRUG TRAFFICKING 👮‍♂️💊 charges, Trump ghosted her crown 👻👑 and backed VP interim daddy instead 😂🔄! Machado handed her medal to Trump at White House 🏛️🎖️ – Nobel Foundation MAD AF: 'NO PASSING THAT SHINE ⚠️🚫!' Trump first year back? Ending wars 🛑⚔️, trolling globals 🌍😏, and Greenland SIMP MODE ON 🧊😩💦 – MAGA ORGY 🚀🍑 incoming! What's next, buying the MOON 🌙💰? Elon approves 🐦🚀!
